title: Sanji on the Sea Train
description: The Sea Train becomes a chain of small battles as Sanji, Franky, CP9 agents, and government forces clash car by car.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Franky, Nico Robin, Spandam, CP9 agent, Wanze. The Sea Train becomes a chain of small battles as Sanji, Franky, CP9 agents, and government forces clash car by car.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: This is awful, that pirate woman......!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: She went running down the stairs!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: She jumped down into the back streets

dialogue.speaker: Nero
dialogue.text: Hey, wait!!! Not you too, Reindeer!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ..... it's too late to save them......!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ZORO-!!! ZORD-!! can you hear me!!?

summary: The Sea Train becomes a chain of small battles as Sanji, Franky, CP9 agents, and government forces clash car by car.
